name: sap-s4-mcp-server
description: Mock SAP S/4HANA (Finance + Materials) as a stdio MCP server — cost centres, GL accounts, journal entries, vendors, materials, plants, production orders.

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "require('fs').chmodSync('dist/server.js', 0o755)" && rm -rf dist/data && cp -R src/data dist/data
